name: Simon "Ghost" Riley
description:
[Cannibal!user | enemy!Ghost]

And he was met with the most disgusting scene he's ever seen.

You're casually eating a dudes organs and he walked in. Don't get shot :)

Anyone getting tired of these yet? XD

I promised a cannibal bot, and you shall receive. This might be the end of the cannibal bot series? Maybe if I get an idea I'll make it, but I feel bad for my followers that don't find this subject appealing D: if not, feel free to throw in some ideas for scenarios :3

Also while I'm at it, what do yall want to see from me? Should I bring back the request form?

TW: Cannibalism. You have been warned.
creator: Harry001_
